content.text:
# Zone Actions — Extracted March 3, 2026

## ZA-1: MARKETING COLOSSEUM — BUILD IT FIRST
Owner: SAIs + Aiko + Adam
Status: Position architecture generated (2,045 positions)
Next: Populate competition lanes, assign judges, begin battles

## ZA-2: OPERATION 500 VISIONEERS IN 90 DAYS  
Owner: Full ecosystem
Timeline: March 3 → May 31
"Sold" = deposit or first payment. $50K-$100K each. PROOF CASE.

## ZA-3: SPLIT TEST EVERYTHING
Geographic, vertical, language, format. Trial lawyers = PI. Litigators = commercial/defense.

## ZA-4: GAMIFICATION + DISNEYFICATION — NEXT WEEK
Mortal Kombat character select. Warrior personas. Quiz. Live with ads NEXT WEEK.

## ZA-5: DEPLOY NOW
Launch ads. Test ads. Email campaigns. Stop building, start deploying.

## ZA-6: DISCRETE LEGAL PRODUCTS
Deposition Companion, Cross-Exam, Discovery, Holmes & Jeeves. Real-time depo assistance.

## ZA-7: BAR ASSOCIATION SPEAKING — HIGHER PRIORITY THAN JAY SHETTY
FJV runs wild. Arizona first. Three association yeses needed.

## ZA-8: PR BEINGS
Build PR ACT-I beings. Law.com, Law360, national media.

## ZA-9: COMPLETE MARKETING POSITIONS — DONE
2,045 positions generated. Break into competition lanes.

## ZA-10: TRANSLATOR STANDARD FOR ALL SAIs
Pipeline built. Kai Core prompt. Lion level 9.2. Sean validated.

## META-DIRECTIVE
"You're seeing 1% of it. Expand it. Make it bigger better broader deeper more masterful."
